page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r5.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is weak, as evidenced by a Geekbench single-core score of 969.0 and a stress-ng single-core score of 1105.79. However, multi-core execution is more robust, with stress-ng multi-core performance and Passmark CPU scores reaching average tiers. Memory bandwidth is also average, measuring 328.36 GB/sec for cached reads and approximately 41.01 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. Single-threaded compression and decompression tasks, such as gzip and bzip3, perform poorly, while small-model LLM inference achieves average speeds of 120.03 tokens/sec for text generation.

Given its high memory density relative to compute resources, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial RAM without demanding top-tier single-core CPU speeds. The lack of local storage requires reliance on network-attached storage. This hardware profile is best suited for memory-intensive applications such as caching layers, medium-sized databases, and multi-threaded enterprise applications that benefit from the 64.0 GB memory allocation and dedicated Intel Xeon cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r5.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, it delivers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPUs. Baseline network bandwidth is rated at 2 Gbps. Benchmark results show weak single-core performance, with a Geekbench single-core score of 969.0, but average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth capabilities, including a stress-ng multi-core score of 5885.34. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy workloads that do not require high single-threaded compute power. It is best suited for database operations, caching layers, and multi-threaded enterprise applications.

meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r5.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64.0 GB of RAM, designed for database and caching workloads.
tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized instance featuring a high RAM-to-vCPU ratio for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database caching.
